word: H3307 - יָפֵחַ - yâphêach - yaw-fay'-akh - Such as breathe out

sections.paragraph:
Original: יפח

Transliteration: yâphêach

Phonetic: yaw-fay'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. a breathing out, exhaling, puffing out (substantive)

Origin: from H3306

TWOT entry: 891a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
